RULING: NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. DENIED, FAILED TO SHIFT BURDEN. Prevailing party to prepare order. = (302/REQ/PB)BELDON YEE #2647

MOTION To Compel Answers To Post-Judgment Discovery; And For Award Of Monetary Sanctions;
Off Calendar May-05-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Plaintiff Creditors Trade Association's motion to compel responses to post judgment discovery is denied. Both the motion and the written discovery that is the subject of the motion were not served on defendant's address of record.
COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN
